request.player_input: I look around for berries to eat

response.narrative_text: You push through the tangled undergrowth, your herbalism training guiding your eye. Among the ferns and fallen branches, you spot a cluster of blackberry bushes heavy with dark, ripe fruit. Their sweet smell mingles with the damp forest loam. You gather a generous handful, careful to avoid the thorns—enough to quiet the hunger gnawing at your belly.
